document_summary: Official Ministry of Education document: Notice on the Issuance of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences), Education and Social Sciences Department No. [2009] 1, dated March 12, 2009. Establishes the credibility and prestige of the award Dehuan Liu received (documented in B8).

snippets.text: Information Name: Notice of the Ministry of Education on the Issuance of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)Information Index: 360A13- 14- 2009- 0087- 1 Generation Date: March 12, 2009Issuing Agency: Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaDocument Issue No.: Education and Social Sciences Department No. [2009] 1 Information Category: Scientific Research Brief Introduction to Contents: The Ministry of Education formulated the Rewarding Method for Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences) on the basis of the amendment to the Provisional Management Method for Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences).
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education
snippets.reasoning: Official government document establishing the award framework, demonstrating institutional backing by China's Ministry of Education

snippets.text: In order to commend the researchers who have made outstanding contributions in the research of humanities and social sciences in colleges and universities, encourage the researchers in colleges and universities to take Marxism as their guide, insist on linking theory with practice, actively carry out scientific research, be brave in innovation, vigorously promote the innovation of discipline system, academic viewpoints and scientific research methods, and better play the role of a think tank for the cause of the Party and the people and serve the cause of building socialism with Chinese characteristics, the Ministry of Education, on the basis of the revision of the Based on the revision of the Interim Measures for Awarding Outstanding Achievements in Humanities and Social Sciences Research of Chinese
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award
snippets.reasoning: States the award's purpose: to commend researchers with outstanding contributions in humanities and social sciences

snippets.text: Article 1 In order to reward researchers who have made outstanding contributions in the field of humanities and social sciences, encourage active exploration and innovation, promote the prosperity of humanities and social sciences in colleges and universities, and better serve the construction of socialism with Chinese characteristics, the Ministry of Education has established the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Colleges and Universities (Humanities and Social Sciences), and has formulated these measures.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award
snippets.reasoning: Official rules establishing the award as a Ministry-level recognition system for all Chinese universities

snippets.text: All awards are divided into grand prizes, first prizes, second prizes and third prizes.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award
snippets.reasoning: Award has hierarchical prize structure including grand prizes, demonstrating selectivity

snippets.text: Article 4 The Ministry of Education shall set up an Award committee for Excellence in Scientific Research (Humanities and Social Sciences) of Institutions of higher Learning (hereinafter referred to as the Award Committee), which shall be composed of the director, deputy directors of the Social Sciences Committee of the Ministry of Education, the convenors of each department and the heads of the departments, bureaus and units concerned of the Ministry of Education. The award committee shall be responsible for examining and approving the award evaluation scheme, employing the experts of the evaluation committee, drawing up the list of winners and award levels, etc.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award Committee
snippets.reasoning: Award committee chaired by Ministry of Education leadership with expert scholars, demonstrating high-level institutional oversight

snippets.text: Article 12 The awarded results must adhere to Marxism as the guide, have a clear viewpoint, sufficient arguments, informative information, accurate data, strict logic, scientific methods, be innovative and cutting- edge, conform to academic ethics and academic norms, and reflect the unity of political and academic standards.
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award
snippets.reasoning: Stringent evaluation criteria requiring innovation, cutting-edge work, scientific methods, and adherence to academic norms
